LanguageData.UB_SNS_SleeperAgent.title: Glitterworld sleeper agent
LanguageData.UB_SNS_SleeperAgent.description: Down on their luck and barely scraping by every day, [PAWN_nameDef] was dying for any chance to be accepted back into society, and once an opportunity presented itself, [PAWN_pronoun] took it without hesitation. A pink flyer with the promise of food and shelter sounded too good to be true, and it was. [PAWN_nameDef] was put through torturous trials of life and death for months before being released as a husk with a new name. Once their purpose was fulfilled, they were exiled and deemed a threat.
